description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a dark outer frame and two prominent, light-colored front drawers. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for placing objects or decor. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and geometric form. The drawers are handleless, with recessed grooves for opening, contributing to the sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, possibly with a laminate or painted finish. Its sturdy build and neutral color palette make it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with two light-colored drawers set in a dark frame, featuring a flat top and minimalist, handleless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two light-colored drawers with recessed grooves, framed by a dark border.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid, dark panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, dark surface with no drawers or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid, dark panel.
